prompt: I need to add a new URS: 'Users must be able to export their personal data in a machine-readable format (e.g., JSON).' This has a high priority. Also, clarify what 'real-time updates' in FS-050 means exactly, what's the maximum acceptable delay?

expected.addRequirement: add a new URS: 'Users must be able to export their personal data in a machine-readable format (e.g., JSON).'
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to High for the new URS regarding data export functionality.
expected.clarifyRequirement: clarify what 'real-time updates' in FS-050 means exactly, specifically the maximum acceptable delay.
